title: HISB (How It Should Be)
description: You shouldn't play Vanilla Minecraft without This ! This modpack makes Minecraft look like as in the Trailer and improves small things to make the game less boring.
body:
![hisbbanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0874c616ed7e28b762fa4623221080c3ea0e317b_0.webp)

### Trailer

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/rK9wOsUG8Jk?si=5H5MS71dIYWjGYdX" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Overview
Welcome to the **HISB** modpack! This carefully chosen collection of mods aims to enhance your Minecraft journey by enriching the classic gameplay with subtle yet impactful improvements. Designed for players who love the essence of vanilla Minecraft but crave a bit more depth, this modpack adds features the community has long desired, gives a trailer-like feeling, while preserving the game's core charm.

### Features

**Enhanced Exploration:**
- **Additional Biomes and Structures:** Discover new tweaked biomes that blend perfectly with the existing world, alongside new structures such as jungle villages (at last) and mystical ruins in the end.

**⚙️ Improved Gameplay Mechanics:**
- **Quality of Life Enhancements:** Enjoy small but significant improvements like better crafting interfaces.
- **New expressions:** Villages are now more lively and interactive, with improved facial expressions for villagers, new jobs for villagers, and new trading opportunities. Passive mobs and hostile mobs also have animations to make them less boring.

**⚠️ New Adventures and Challenges:**
- **New hostile mobs:** Face off against new, challenging mobs that were sadly abandoned due to the mob votes.

**🧱 Expanded Building Options:**
- **New Blocks and Decorations:** Access a wider variety of building blocks and decorative items to let your creativity run wild. From VERTICAL SLABS to intricate VERTICAL SLABS, the building possibilities are endless.

**👥 Community-Requested Features:**
- **Inventory Expansion:** Carry more items on your adventures with the bundle.

**📈 Performance and Optimization:**
- **Optimized Performance:** Enjoy a smoother gameplay experience with mods that improve game performance, reduce lag, and optimize resource usage, like Sodium, FerriteCore, Lithium and more with tweaked settings.
- If you are on a **low-end pc**, hit the key O ingame and change your shader to **Mellow Shaders**.

**Credit to all the devs for their incredible mods and Mojang for this incredible game 😊**
